title: US Oil, Gas Drilling Activity Slows
summary: The total number of active drilling rigs for oil and gas in the United States fell this week, according to new data that Baker Hughes published on Friday, bringing the total rig count in the US to 543, down 42 from this same time last year. summary: Innovation in the exchange-traded fund industry could come at a cost to investors during extreme volatility.
